name: Gram's Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir until the sugar dissolves.
3. Grill chicken or spare ribs until almost done.
4. During the last 15 to 30 minutes of grilling, baste the meat with the sauce.
